x-enumeration-literals.name: Case Initiation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Starting and managing the administrative case for a claim

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Administrative correction of amounts, parties, or timelines

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Escalation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Raising the claim for higher-level review

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Referral Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Handoff of claim to another authority, e.g., underwriter

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Closure Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Final administrative closing of the claim

x-enumeration-literals.name: SLA Management Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Managing processing timelines and service-level obligations
